holdings.infoBox: CGGO is an equity ETF with a total of 120 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 6.79%, Micron Technology at 5.13%, SK hynix at 4.70%, Broadcom at 3.21%, and Alphabet at 3.20%.

overview.description: The Capital Group Global Growth Equity ETF (CGGO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in US and non-US companies of any market capitalization with growth potential. CGGO was launched on Feb 22, 2022 and is issued by Capital Group.

data.text: With an ever-growing list of similar-sounding ETFs to choose from, finding the best is an increasingly difficult task. My report shows the top-rated ETF for each style.

data.title: Capital Group's first foray into exchange-traded funds won't be its last, its head of ETFs says
data.text: The firm's first six exchange-traded funds are actively managed strategies designed to be core portfolio holdings, says Capital Group's Holly Framsted.
